prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中国人民大学在上海市综合类最低位次分别为约2795名、2335名、1900名、2684名、4096名。2021–2023年位次逐年前移（竞争加剧），2024年回落至2684名，2025年大幅后移至4096名，较2024年后移约1412名，波动显著；2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021年14人、2022年14人、2023年13人、2024年13人、2025年11人、2026年13人。2025年较2024年缩招2人，2026年较2025年扩招2人（+18.2%），扩招有利于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国人民大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第18名、2022年第19名、2023年第18名、2024年第18名、2025年第17名、2026年第17名，稳居全国前20，属于顶尖高校层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风（师生关系协议制度、性骚扰事件讨论）及考研压分争议，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；2025年周期评价为中性/混合（性骚扰事件+新闻传播学A++正面信号）；抖音热度排名第44位（较热），整体曝光中等偏上。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，中国人民大学拥有A+学科9个（中国语言文学、工商管理、应用经济学、新闻传播学、法学、理论经济学、社会学、统计学、马克思主义理论），A学科5个（中国史、哲学、外国语言文学、政治学、计算机科学与技术），A-学科1个（物理学），A-及以上共15个，学科实力全国顶尖。招生专业中法学（A+）、金融学类（应用经济学A+）、经济学类（理论经济学A+、应用经济学A+）、新闻传播学类（A+）、统计学类（A+）、人工智能/计算机类（计算机科学与技术A）等均对应顶级学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学2023年偏热推荐、2024年分化观望；新闻传播学2023年明显劝退；金融/财经/经济类2023–2024年分化观望；计算机类2024年推荐偏热；统计学（属数学/统计大类）2024年推荐偏热。整体而言，人大王牌文科专业热度有所分化，但顶尖学科吸引力仍强。上海市2021–2025年综合类考生数分别为44086、44839、51560、41594、49276，2026年总考生约66700人（较2025年增加约35.4%），竞争显著加剧；中国人民大学位于北京，在上海市招生计划较少（11–14人），属跨省招生；上海考生对京沪顶尖高校偏好较强，人大作为文科顶尖学府在上海考生中认可度极高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4096名大幅后移、2026年扩招2人（+18.2%）缓解竞争、2026年上海考生总数大幅增加（+35.4%）加剧竞争、声誉偏负面可能抑制报考热度等因素，考虑考生大幅增加因素小幅修正后，预测2026年最低位次约4493名，区间3993–4993名。最关键影响因素为：①2025年位次已大幅后移形成新基准；②2026年考生总数大幅增加推高竞争烈度；③扩招2人部分对冲竞争压力。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 金融学类
- 经济学类
- 统计学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新闻传播学类
- 人工智能
- 计算机类（图灵班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人文科学试验班（含哲学、汉语言文学、历史学等）
- 社会科学试验班（PPE/管理学科类）
- 理科试验班（金融与大数据技术创新）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4493名，区间3993–4993名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<3993名）可重点冲击法学、金融学类、经济学类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>4993名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入人大平台后再通过校内选拔或转专业路径。人大各专业学科评估均为顶尖水平，即使三档专业也具备极强的学术底蕴。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Renmin University of China in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 2795, 2335, 1900, 2684, and 4096 respectively. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (increased competition), fell back to 2684 in 2024, and significantly shifted backward to 4096 in 2025, a backward shift of about 1412 places compared to 2024, showing notable fluctuation; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096. The enrollment plan for Renmin University of China in Shanghai's comprehensive category: 14 students in 2021, 14 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 11 in 2025, and 13 in 2026. Compared to 2024, enrollment decreased by 2 students in 2025, and increased by 2 students in 2026 compared to 2025 (+18.2%), which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Renmin University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 18th in 2021, 19th in 2022, 18th in 2023, 18th in 2024, 17th in 2025, and 17th in 2026, consistently in the national top 20, belonging to the top-tier university level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and style (teacher-student relationship agreement system, discussion of sexual harassment incidents) and controversy over score suppression in postgraduate entrance exams, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; the evaluation for the 2025 cycle is neutral/mixed (sexual harassment incidents + positive signal of A++ in Journalism and Communication); Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with overall exposure moderately high. No obvious records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Renmin University of China has 9 A+ disciplines (Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Journalism and Communication, Law, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Marxist Theory), 5 A disciplines (Chinese History, Philosophy, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Political Science, Computer Science and Technology), and 1 A- discipline (Physics), with a total of 15 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating top national disciplinary strength. Among the enrollment majors, Law (A+), Finance (Applied Economics A+), Economics (Theoretical Economics A+, Applied Economics A+), Journalism and Communication (A+), Statistics (A+), and Artificial Intelligence/Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology A) all correspond to top-tier disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law was recommended as hot in 2023, but showed divergence and wait-and-see in 2024; Journalism and Communication was clearly discouraged in 2023; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics showed divergence and wait-and-see from 2023 to 2024; Computer Science was recommended as hot in 2024; Statistics (under the Mathematics/Statistics category) was recommended as hot in 2024. Overall, the popularity of Renmin University's flagship liberal arts majors has somewhat diverged, but the appeal of top-tier disciplines remains strong. The number of comprehensive category candidates in Shanghai from 2021 to 2025 was 44,086, 44,839, 51,560, 41,594, and 49,276 respectively, with total candidates in 2026 approximately 66,700 (an increase of about 35.4% compared to 2025), significantly intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, with a small enrollment plan in Shanghai (11-14 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Shanghai candidates have a strong preference for top universities in Beijing and Shanghai, and Renmin University, as a top liberal arts institution, enjoys extremely high recognition among Shanghai candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant backward shift of the 2025 baseline ranking of 4096, the expansion of 2 students in 2026 (+18.2%) alleviating competition, the substantial increase in the total number of Shanghai candidates in 2026 (+35.4%) intensifying competition, and the somewhat negative reputation potentially suppressing application enthusiasm, after minor adjustments accounting for the significant increase in candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4493, with a range of 3993 to 4993. The most critical influencing factors are: ① The 2025 ranking has already significantly shifted backward, forming a new baseline; ② The substantial increase in total candidates in 2026 raises competition intensity; ③ The expansion of 2 students partially offsets competitive pressure.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Finance
- Economics
- Statistics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Computer Science (Turing Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, History, etc.)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (PPE/Management Disciplines)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Big Data Technology Innovation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 4493, range 3993–4993. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3993), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law, Finance, and Economics; if ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4993), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, aiming to enter Renmin University's platform and then transfer through internal selection or major change pathways. All majors at Renmin University have top-tier disciplinary evaluations, and even Tier 3 majors possess extremely strong academic foundations.
